title: Vaccine-associated paralytic poliomyelitis: a case report of flaccid monoparesis after oral polio vaccine.
summary: Case report of the first confirmed recipient vaccine-associated paralytic poliomyelitis (VAPP) in Korea, involving a 4-month-old male who developed flaccid monoparesis after receiving the oral polio vaccine (OPV).
key_findings: First officially approved recipient VAPP case in Korea.
Flaccid paralysis occurred 4 weeks after OPV immunization.
